scripts.dev: cross-env DEVTOOL=1 concurrently "npm run main:dev" "npm run watch"
scripts.build: npm run polywise:build && npm run rebuild && npm run main:prod && npm run transform
scripts.build:mac:prep: npm run polywise:build && npm run clean && npm run main:prod && npm run transform
scripts.build:mac:x64: cross-env BUILD_ARCH=x64 npm run rebuild && cross-env BUILD_ARCH=x64 electron-builder -m --x64
scripts.build:mac:arm64: cross-env BUILD_ARCH=arm64 npm run rebuild && cross-env BUILD_ARCH=arm64 electron-builder -m --arm64
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:mac:prep && npm run build:mac:x64 && npm run build:mac:arm64
scripts.build:win: npm run polywise:build && npm run clean && npm run main:prod && npm run transform && electron-builder -w
scripts.build:mac:debug: npm run build:mac:prep && npm run rebuild && electron-builder -m
